zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Willoughby於1371年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Robert de Willerby36歲，母親Isabella Otteby32歲。她於1389年與Sir John Carrington Smith在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1421年5月9日在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾諾維爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾達林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Willoughby于1371年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Robert de Willerby36岁，母亲Isabella Otteby32岁。她于1389年与Sir John Carrington Smith在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1421年5月9日在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾諾維爾享年50岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾達林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Willoughby was born in 1371, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert de Willerby, was 36 and her mother, Isabella Otteby, was 32. She married Sir John Carrington Smith in 1389, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 9 May 1421, in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Dallington, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Willoughby est née en 1371, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Willerby, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Isabella Otteby, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Carrington Smith en 1389, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1421, à Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Dallington, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Willoughby 1371 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Willerby 36 und ihre Mutter Isabella Otteby 32. Sie hat 1389 in England, United Kingdom Sir John Carrington Smith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1421 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Norwell, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dallington, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Willoughby è nata il nel 1371 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Willerby, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Isabella Otteby, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Carrington Smith nel 1389, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 maggio 1421, nel Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Dallington, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Willoughbyが1371年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Willerbyは36歳，母Isabella Ottebyは32歳であった。1389年にイギリスイギリスでSir John Carrington Smithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1421年5月9日にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアノーウエルで50歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアダリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Willoughby(이)가 1371년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Willerby(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Otteby(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir John Carrington Smith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1421년 5월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 노웰에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 댈링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Willoughby nasceu em 1371, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Willerby, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Otteby, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Carrington Smith em 1389, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1421, em Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Dallington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Willoughby родилась в 1371 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Willerby было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Otteby, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Carrington Smith в 1389 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 мая 1421 г. в местности норвелл, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности даллингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Willoughby nació en 1371, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Willerby, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Isabella Otteby, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir John Carrington Smith en 1389, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1421, en Norwell, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Dallington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
